q: Number System: Find the largest number of four digits exactly divisible by 12, 15, 18, and 27.
Ratio & Proportion: A bag contains rupees, 50-paise and 25-paise coins in the ratio 5:6:8. If the total amount is Rs.210, find the number of 25-paise coins.
Probability: Two dice are thrown simultaneously. What is the probability of getting two numbers whose product is even?
Time & Work: A can do a piece of work in 24 days. If B is 60% more efficient than A, then how many days does B require to do the same work?
Speed & Distance: A train running at 54 km/hr crosses a platform in 20 seconds. If the length of the train is 150m, what is the length of the platform?
Algebra: If x + 1/x = 5, find the value of x^3 + 1/x^3.
Geometry: A triangle has sides 5, 12, and 13. What is the radius of the inscribed circle?
Trigonometry: In a right angled triangle, if tan(A) = 3/4, what is the value of cos(A)?
Clocks: What is the angle between the minute hand and the hour hand of a clock at 3:40?
Calendars: What day of the week was on 15th August 1947?
Profit & Loss: A merchant marks his goods up by 50% and then offers a discount on the marked price. If he makes a 20% profit, what is the discount percentage?
Logarithms: If log(2) = 0.3010 and log(3) = 0.4771, find the value of log(72).
Combinatorics: In how many ways can a committee of 5 be formed from 6 men and 4 women if at least 2 women must be included?
Mixture: A container contains 40 litres of milk. From this, 4 litres of milk was taken out and replaced by water. This process was repeated further two times. How much milk is now in the container?
Simple Interest: At what rate percent per annum will a sum of money double in 16 years?
Ages: The present ages of A and B are in the ratio 4:5. Eight years hence, the ratio of their ages will be 5:6. What is A's present age?
Data Interpretation: From a dataset of 5, 9, x, 14, 21, if the mean is 12, what is the value of x?
Mensuration: If the radius of a cylinder is doubled and its height is halved, by what percent does its volume increase?
Pipes & Cisterns: Pipe A can fill a tank in 10 hours, B in 15 hours. If both are opened together, how long will it take?
Permutations: How many unique string sets can be formed by rearranging ALGORITHM?
Number Theory: If 2^x = 3^y = 6^-z, what is the value of 1/x + 1/y + 1/z?
Probability: In a group of 50 people, what is the probability that at least two people share the same birthday?
Combinatorics: A spider has 8 distinguishable legs. It wants to put on 8 socks and 8 shoes, one on each leg. The sock must go on before the shoe. How many orders are possible?
Geometry: A point P is inside an equilateral triangle. Its perpendicular distances from the three sides are 3, 4, and 5. What is the side length of the triangle?
Algebra: Evaluate the infinite nested radical √(2 + √(2 + √(2 + ...)))
Number Theory: Find the remainder when 3^2022 is divided by 5.
Probability: Three points are chosen independently at random on the circumference of a circle. What is the probability that the triangle formed by them contains the center?
Work & Time: A takes as much time as B and C together. B takes 3 times as much time as C and A together. If C takes 20 days, how long do A, B, and C take together?
Permutations: Determine the number of ways to arrange the letters of the word 'ASSASSINATION' such that no two A's are adjacent.

Game Theory: Two players play a game starting with 100 on a board. At each turn, a player can subtract a divisor of the current number (but not the number itself). The player unable to make a move loses. Who wins?
Algebra: If f(x) = (x^2+1)/(x), what is the minimum value of f(x) for x > 0?
Combinatorics: How many paths are there from (0,0) to (5,5) on a grid moving only up and right?
Probability: Two numbers are chosen randomly between 0 and 1. What is the probability that their sum is less than 1?
Number Theory: What is the last digit of 7^2023?
Mixture: 20L of 30% alcohol is mixed with 30L of 60% alcohol. What is the final concentration?
Speed & Distance: Two trains start towards each other from A and B. After crossing, they take 4h and 9h to reach B and A. Find ratio of speeds.
Work & Time: A and B can do a job in 12 days, B and C in 15 days, C and A in 20 days. How long for A alone?
Geometry: A cube of side 4 is cut into smaller cubes of side 1. The ratio of new surface area to old is?
Probability: 3 coins are tossed. Probability of getting exactly 2 heads?
Algebra: Sum of roots of x^3 - 6x^2 + 11x - 6 = 0 is?
Number Theory: The number of trailing zeros in 100! is?
Profit & Loss: A man sells two articles at Rs99 each. One at 10% profit, other at 10% loss. Net result?
Clock: Angle between hands at 4:15?
Trig: Max value of 3sin(x) + 4cos(x)?
Permutations: Words from 'MISSISSIPPI'?
Venn: In a class, 40 like Math, 30 like Science, 10 like both. Total?
Interest: Difference between CI and SI on Rs1000 for 2 yrs at 10%?
Age: Father is 3x son. In 10 years, he will be 2x. Father's current age?
Pipes: Pipe A fills in 4h, B in 6h. C empties in 12h. Together they fill in?
Dist: A walks at 4kmph and reaches 10min late. At 5kmph he is 5min early. Distance?
